channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 142bfaed-a13f-4c2d-bed2-6db62c4a1009
Display name: Foundry Project Runtime User
Description: Allows interacting with Foundry agents at runtime with minimal required permissions.
Link: https://management.azure.com/142bfaed-a13f-4c2d-bed2-6db62c4a1009?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 223653d0-bf85-419e-ac7a-a67edf5fc44b
Display name: Azure AIManager User
Description: Grants read access to Azure resources provided by Kubernetes AI Manager, including aimanagers, deployments, namespace, etc.
Link: https://management.azure.com/223653d0-bf85-419e-ac7a-a67edf5fc44b?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 413f2675-4911-4010-be3b-c720b43a3c59
Display name: Azure AIManager Contributor
Description: Grants read/write access to Azure resources provided by Kubernetes AI Manager, including aimanagers, deployments, namespace, etc.
Link: https://management.azure.com/413f2675-4911-4010-be3b-c720b43a3c59?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 9c77f8a7-b0b9-4462-844c-de6e66add8ba
Display name: Azure AIManager and namespace RBAC Reader
Description: Allows read-only access to all objects in an Azure AI Manager namespace, except Secrets, roles, and role bindings. Applying this role at the AI Manager scope will give access across all namespaces.
Link: https://management.azure.com/9c77f8a7-b0b9-4462-844c-de6e66add8ba?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: eed3b665-ab3a-47b6-8f48-c9382fb1dad6
Display name: Foundry Agent Consumer
Description: Allows interacting with Foundry agents at runtime.
Link: https://management.azure.com/eed3b665-ab3a-47b6-8f48-c9382fb1dad6?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: f5db7409-a2c6-4d0c-8cf4-412ac01a38df
Display name: Azure NetApp Files Administrator
Description: Allows full administrative access to Azure NetApp Files operations
Link: https://management.azure.com/f5db7409-a2c6-4d0c-8cf4-412ac01a38df?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: f680209a-a2a2-4e0d-aa81-5d2a65c13604
Display name: Advisor Recommendations Contributor
Description: View assessment recommendations, accepted review recommendations, and manage the recommendations lifecycle (mark recommendations as completed, postponed or dismissed, in progress, or not started).
Link: https://management.azure.com/f680209a-a2a2-4e0d-aa81-5d2a65c13604?api-version=2022-04-01
